summary: Senior Python backend engineer with 8 years of experience building and operating API-driven services. Experienced with FastAPI, PostgreSQL, Docker, and AWS, with a track record of improving reliability, delivery speed, and service observability. Led a team of 5 engineers while delivering backend platforms and data-intensive services.

highlights: Led development of FastAPI microservices for checkout and account workflows.
Designed PostgreSQL schemas and query patterns to support higher traffic and lower latency.
Packaged services with Docker and deployed workloads on AWS.
Mentored and coordinated a team of 5 engineers across sprint planning and delivery.
Built internal and customer-facing Python APIs for payments and reconciliation.
Implemented PostgreSQL-backed data models and reporting endpoints.
Improved deployment consistency using Docker-based development and release workflows.
Partnered with product and QA to reduce production defects and speed up releases.
Developed Python services for user management and notification delivery.
Created REST endpoints and database integrations with PostgreSQL.
Supported containerized local environments to streamline team development.
Contributed to cloud-hosted application maintenance and troubleshooting.

summary: Mid-level Python backend engineer based in Berlin with production experience building Django services, integrating Redis-backed caching and queues, and working with PostgreSQL in cloud-hosted environments. Comfortable shipping containerized APIs with Docker, collaborating in agile teams, and writing maintainable backend code for business-critical systems. Native German speaker and fluent in English.

highlights: Designs and maintains Django-based API services for internal operations and customer workflows.
Uses Redis for caching, background jobs, and rate-limiting to improve responsiveness.
Works with PostgreSQL schema changes, query optimization, and data integrity checks.
Containerizes services with Docker and supports deployment automation in the release pipeline.
Built and extended Python services for order processing and account management.
Implemented Django endpoints and data models connected to PostgreSQL.
Introduced Redis caching for frequently accessed data and asynchronous task handling.
Improved API reliability through code reviews, testing, and production issue triage.
Developed backend features in Python under senior engineer guidance.
Supported REST API work, database migrations, and bug fixes across release cycles.
Used Docker for local development environments and reproducible builds.
Documented endpoints and collaborated with frontend and QA colleagues.

summary: Junior Python API Engineer with 2 years of backend experience building REST APIs, data models, and automated tests. Experienced in Flask, SQLAlchemy, Pytest, and Git, with a focus on clean API design, reliable database integration, and maintainable code.

highlights: Develop REST endpoints for internal and customer-facing services using Flask.
Model application data with SQLAlchemy and write database queries for PostgreSQL-backed features.
Create automated test coverage with Pytest for API behavior and edge cases.
Use Git workflows for code reviews, branching, and release preparation.
Supported development of Python services and small API enhancements.
Helped implement SQLAlchemy models and migration-ready schema changes.
Built and maintained Pytest suites for endpoint validation and regression checks.
Collaborated with senior engineers through Git pull requests and issue tracking.

projects.name: Community Events API
projects.description: Built a Flask API for managing community events, including endpoints for event listings, registrations, and organizer updates. Used SQLAlchemy for persistence and Pytest to verify key API flows and database interactions.
